Rio 2 (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $131,538,435Details
International Box Office $361,307,856
Worldwide Box Office $492,846,291
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $33,125,695
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $25,391,364
Total $58,517,059
Further financial details...

Synopsis

It's a jungle out there for Blu, Jewel and their three kids, after they're hurtled from that magical city to the wilds of the Amazon. As Blu tries to fit in, he goes beak-to-beak with the vengeful Nigel, and meets the most fearsome adversary of all – his father-in-law.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$39,327,869 (29.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:26.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$130,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,948 opening theaters/3,975 max. theaters, 6.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $192,558,105

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 11th, 2014 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox

Synopsis

It's a jungle out there for Blu, Jewel and their three kids, after they're hurtled from that magical city to the wilds of the Amazon. As Blu tries to fit in, he goes beak-to-beak with the vengeful Nigel, and meets the most fearsome adversary of all – his father-in-law.
